chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-882 of 2026 (Abdul Ghaffar Shar versus Ahmed Ali Siddiqui & others) Date Order with signature of Judge Mr. Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon Mr. Justice Zulfiqar Ali Sangi 1. For order on CMA No.7355/2026 (Withdrawal) 2. For order on office objection 3. For hearing of main case 04.5.2026 None present for the petitioner Mr. Masroor Ahmed advocate for the respondent / KW&SC --------------------- ORDER Adnan-ul-Karim Memon, J. Petitioner Abdul Ghaffar Shar has filed this Constitutional Petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, seeking following relief: - a) To declare that the acts, omissions and actions of the respondents No.1, 2, 4 to 10 in favour of the respondent No.3 is null, void, ab-initio and against the law as well as justice even to pass an order to conduct free, fair and impartial enquiry into the matter. b) To adjust any honest, hardworking, deserving and bold officer to hold the positions as per their rank and cadre. c) To direct the official respondents to revert back the respondent No.3 to his parent department and to post him at the positon as per his cadre. It appears that the petitioner has filed application bearing CMA No.7355/2026 for withdrawal of the instant petition unconditionally. Application is allowed. Petition is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
